subcodes.first_line: O ye two who stand firm in the Covenant! Your letter brought joy to hearts, and its contents imparted the essence of the sealed wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان تحریر سبب تسریر قلوب بود و مضمون نشئه رحیق مختوم بخشید
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
